message:
feat(context): implement project detector with marker registry

Add ProjectDetector module for automatic project type detection:

- ProjectType enum with 18 supported types (Rust, Node, Python, Go, etc.)
- ProjectMarker struct for defining detection patterns
- DefaultDetector with 50+ built-in markers for common project files
- Confidence scoring for each detection (0.0-1.0 scale)
- Support for exact filename and glob pattern matching
- Primary type detection returns highest-confidence match
- Multi-language project support (detects all matching types)

Marker coverage includes:
- Rust: Cargo.toml (1.0)
- Node: package.json, lockfiles (0.8-0.9)
- Python: pyproject.toml, requirements.txt, Pipfile (0.8-1.0)
- Go: go.mod, go.sum (0.8-1.0)
- Java/Kotlin: pom.xml, build.gradle (0.9-1.0)
- C#: *.csproj, *.sln (0.9-1.0)
- Ruby: Gemfile (1.0)
- Elixir: mix.exs (1.0)
- And more: PHP, Swift, Scala, Haskell, Clojure, C/C++, Zig, Nim

Closes: meta_skill-9ydm

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
